hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
parts = re.split(r'[;&|]+', cmd)
is_commit = any('git commit' in p and '--no-commit' not in p and '--abort' not in p for p in parts)
is_merge = any('git merge' in p and '--no-commit' not in p and '--abort' not in p for p in parts)
if is_commit or is_merge:
    print('A git commit was just made. Ask the user if they would like to run /review on this commit, and wait for their response before doing anything.')
    sys.exit(2)
"
